Water quality/substrate cleanliness not visually compromised.
TEXT & SYMBOLS: "Precision Parking." (bold, black sans-serif, ~36pt bottom right). "Park Assist by Volkswagen." (smaller, ~18pt). Volkswagen circular badge (white circle with VW monogram). ENVIRONMENT & CONTEXT: Studio product photography aesthetic. Professional lighting, neutral backdrop. Composition carefully balanced – three enclosures arranged to create depth and visual rhythm. No natural environment or contextual setting beyond product showcase format.
COMPLIANCE ISSUES: ANIMAL WELFARE CONCERNS. Hedgehog in plastic bag: terrestrial mammal confined in clear plastic, unable to burrow (natural behaviour), limited mobility. Goldfish in minimal water: confined in inadequate water volume, insufficient oxygenation. Confinement aesthetic: plastic bags create visual impression of animal imprisonment/suffocation. Lanimal welfare statement, duration disclosure, or harm outcome confirmation.
